title: euphrasia portae subsp. portae
intro: Euphrasia portae subsp. portae, also known as the Alpine Eyebright, is a plant species in the family Orobanchaceae, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Alpine Eyebright lie in its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating eye and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Euphrasia portae subsp. portae include alleviating symptoms of conjunctivitis, sinusitis, and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Alpine Eyebright can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a medicinal remedy.
